mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( post_id, target_type, reporter_id, reason_type, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{userId}, #{reasonType}, #{content}, 'PENDING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.status, r.target_type AS targetType, r.post_id AS targetId FROM report r WHERE r.id = #{id}
